title: Charity Impact
description: Schema for charity impact metrics, focusing on animal advocacy.

beneficiaries.description: Demographics of the primary beneficiaries, tailored for animal advocacy.

location.description: Geographic area of the beneficiaries (e.g., 'Hong Kong', 'Yuen Long District').

population.description: The estimated number of animals in the beneficiary group.

beneficiary_type.description: The primary category of animal beneficiaries.

metrics.description: A list of specific, quantifiable impact metrics.

metric_name.description: A descriptive name for the metric (e.g., 'Animals Rescued', 'Cage-Free Commitments Secured').

value.description: The numerical value of the metric.

context_qualifier.description: A brief, clear summary providing context for the metric (max 150 chars).

counterfactual_baseline.description: What would have happened if the charity did not intervene.

description.description: A concise description of the baseline or control group (max 150 chars).

value.description: The numerical value of the baseline, if available.

evidence_quality.description: The quality of evidence supporting the metric, based on a strict hierarchy.

source_citation.description: A citation for the source of the data (e.g., 'Annual Report 2023, p. 5').

source_url.description: The specific web URL where the metric was found, if sourced from the web.

source_document.description: The type of source document the evidence comes from.

evidence_quote.description: The exact verbatim wording quoted from the source.

search_result_index.description: If source_document is 'web', the 0-based index of the search result snippet used. Used internally for data resolution.

timeframe.description: The temporal scope of the metric, indicating if it's an annual or cumulative figure.

significant_events.description: Key interventions or events undertaken by the charity.

event_name.description: The name of the specific program or intervention.

summary.description: A brief summary of the event or intervention.

source_url.description: The specific web URL where the event was found, if sourced from the web.

source_document.description: The type of source document the evidence comes from.

source_quote.description: The exact verbatim wording quoted from the source.

search_result_index.description: If source_document is 'web', the 0-based index of the search result snippet used. Used internally for data resolution.

timeframe.description: The temporal scope of the event, indicating if it occurred in the reporting year or is a historical milestone.

context.description: Contextual information about the charity's operations and stated costs.

operating_scope.description: Classification of the charity's primary operational focus.

explicit_unit_cost.description: Unit cost explicitly stated by the charity in their reporting.
